name: Cherry Sauce
recipeIngredient: 17 oz Dark sweet cherries, unstrained (pitted or unpitted)
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain cherry juice into a deep, 1-quart, heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole. Set cherries aside. Blend cornstarch into the cherry juice until smooth.
2. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 4 minutes or until thickened and clear. Stir occasionally.
3. Add cherries, lemon juice, and lemon peel to the thickened cherry juice. Stir to combine.
4. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 1 minute or until sauce bubbles and cherries are hot.
5. Spoon over ice cream or cake. Makes 2 cups
Variation: If desired, sauce may be made from canned blueberries, strawberries, raspberries, pineapple, or diced peaches. Cherries Jubilee: Heat ¼ cup brandy in Microwave Oven in a heat-resistant, non-metallic long-handled dish or spoon for 20 seconds. Ignite the brandy and pour over cherry sauce. Spoon over ice cream.
